A bunch of new sales are up and running on the North American Nintendo Switch eShop. These include the lowest prices ever for Astral Ascent, Devil May Cry, and more. text:

text:

BeXide has announced Namco Legendary Mountains for the Nintendo Switch, and the Nintendo Switch 2. The title is planned for launch this summer, with an exact release date not yet provided. author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo denied patent for Poke Ball-style capture-and-release mechanics on touchscreen devices

New information has been discovered that indicates Nintendo has been denied a patent for Poke Ball-style capture-and-release mechanics on touchscreen devices. This would apply to hardware like phones and tablets. All of this goes back to Nintendo’s battle with Pocketpair and Palworld that’s been taking place for about a year now. The Big N, along with The Pokemon Company, was...

The post Nintendo denied patent for Poke Ball-style capture-and-release mechanics on touchscreen devices appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Chicken Climber hitting Nintendo Switch this week

Ratalaika Games, along with Burst Games, have announced the upcoming release of Chicken Climber on Nintendo Switch. The game will be available this Friday, May 22. Chicken Climber is a vertical platformer. The only way to progress is the game is by jumping – there is no standard movement otherwise. Here’s an official overview: Chicken Climber is a challenging vertical...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo confirmed for Gamescom 2026

Nintendo will be attending Gamescom 2026, it’s been announced. Specifics about the company’s activities have yet to be confirmed. However, as always, you can expect playable demos, and attendees can also look forward to various events such as tournaments. Nintendo had previously taken a long absence from Gamescom. In 2023, the company attended for the first since in four years....

The post Nintendo confirmed for Gamescom 2026 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Japan’s best-selling games of April 2026 – Tomodachi Life sees big sales in first month

New data provided by Famitsu gives us a look at Japan’s best-selling games of April 2026. Good news for Pokemon fans: if you missed out on the Pokemon Deluxe Character Guide Limited Edition after pre-orders went live a few days ago, they’re available once again.
